coupon.source_phrase_block: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass offers a 50% discount on 4 full priced tickets. Passes do not apply to Aquarium boat programs, IMAX shows or school group visits. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the Hingham Newcomers Club.
